name: Qualtrics EmployeeXM Experience Management API
what_it_does: Qualtrics EmployeeXM REST API for enterprise employee experience management platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee survey creation, distribution, and response data retrieval, handle 360-degree feedback collection and multi-rater report generation, access continuous listening pulse survey analytics and trend data, retrieve eNPS and employee satisfaction metric tracking, manage onboarding and exit interview survey automation, handle engagement driver analysis and action planning data, access predictive analytics and flight risk identification scoring, retrieve workforce segment benchmarking and industry comparison data, manage manager effectiveness surveys and coaching recommendation data, and integrate employee experience data with Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, Microsoft Teams, and people analytics platforms.
use_cases: Automating pulse survey distribution from HR engagement agents
Retrieving 360 feedback data from talent development agents
Processing exit interview data from HR analytics agents
Monitoring flight risk indicators from workforce retention agents
not_for: Simple one-off surveys without enterprise people analytics and lifecycle management
Customer satisfaction without employee and people analytics focus
SMB HR without enterprise survey sophistication and analytics depth
best_when: An enterprise HR or people analytics team using Qualtrics EmployeeXM wants AI agents to automate survey lifecycle management, 360 feedback, engagement analytics, flight risk identification, and HRIS integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Employee survey data is sensitive — anonymity thresholds must be enforced for all automated reporting; automated access to individual-level responses requires explicit employee consent and HR governance review. 360 feedback data is highly sensitive; automated access to multi-rater data must be restricted to authorized reviewers. Predictive flight risk scores require human HR judgment before action.

auth.notes: Qualtrics uses API key (X-API-TOKEN header) and OAuth 2.0 for partner integrations. Per-user and per-organization API tokens. Developer portal at api.qualtrics.com with full OpenAPI documentation. Webhooks for survey response events. Data center routing required (US, EU, CA, AU data centers). Qualtrics acquired by SAP (2019, $8B) then IPO (2021).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier for EmployeeXM — academic free tier for research only
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; EmployeeXM, CustomerXM, and ResearchCore separately priced
pricing.notes: Provo, Utah. Founded 2002. Public company (XM, NASDAQ). Experience management platform. $1.5B+ annual revenue. SAP partnership after partial acquisition. EmployeeXM for HR; CustomerXM for CX; ResearchCore for research. Strong enterprise analytics. Competes with Peakon and Culture Amp for enterprise employee experience market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; 3,000 requests/day default; higher on enterprise plans

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Enforce anonymity thresholds before automated reporting; individual response access requires consent; 360 feedback data is highly sensitive
Data center routing — API endpoint includes data center identifier (e.g., .fra1.qualtrics.com for EU); wrong data center returns 404; verify DC in account settings
3000 req/day default — rate limit is per-token per-day; high-volume survey data retrieval requires rate management and scheduling
Survey ID required — all operations scoped to survey ID; survey hierarchy (project → survey → response) must be understood before building automation
Response export pattern — large response datasets use async export pattern (start export → poll status → download file); not real-time API
Webhooks for real-time — use webhooks for real-time response notifications; polling response endpoint is inefficient and rate-limited
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee experience management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP. API key/OAuth2. US/EU/CA/AU. Employee survey and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee XM. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, FedRAMP. API key/OAuth2. Multi-region. Employee survey and experience data.
